pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 59: creates input via /input/post with fulljson={"solar_yield":100}
setup_task.sh line 36: creates feed with name=annual_yield parameter
task.json description line 5 specifies renaming original 'annual_yield' feed to 'annual_yield_archive'
setup_task.sh line 36 creates feed with engine=5 parameter; verified via web search that engine 5 is PHPFina (Emoncms Fixed Interval TimeSeries) engine
setup_task.sh line 36 creates feed with options={"interval":10}; verified via web search that interval is measured in seconds and 10 seconds is valid per Emoncms documentation

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Emoncms system with a feed named 'annual_yield' configured with PHPFina engine (ID 5) and 10-second intervals. An input named 'solar_yield' is configured to log to this feed. The setup script generates synthetic historical data (10 data points with values 10, 20, ..., 100) and synthetic ongoing data via a background generator producing values between 100-120 at 5-second intervals. All metadata claims in task.json are verified and accurate.
